steps.t: The Black Dens lie to the south-east of Echad Dagoras. Amarion has asked you to enter the Black Dens and find the source of the Shadow-wolves' power.
Shadow-torches can be found throughout the caverns of the Black Dens. You should douse the torches within the Black Dens to break the strange enchantm…
Amarion is at Echad Dagoras, north-west of the Black Dens. You should return to Amarion with tidings of what you found in the Black Dens.
